body.content: It's good to see you here. We hope you like our services. Click on the button below to validate your email.
Hi, {{ .UserName }}! Would you like to reset your password?
We receive a request for a password reset. Click on the button below to proceed. If you didn't make this request, just ignore this email.
Your account password has just been changed. You can log in our applications with your new password now.
If it was not you who made this change, make sure that you can still log in your account. Then report the case to our support via the following email: {{ .SupportEmail }}.
We received a request to update your account email to {{ .NewEmail }}. If you don't recognize this request, click the button below to cancel it:
If the email has already been updated without your consent, please contact our support at: {{ .SupportEmail }}.

We received a request to update your account email. By confirming, your current email will be replaced with this one, {{ .NewEmail }}. From then on, all our communication will be sent to the new email, including future account recoveries. To proceed with the change, click the button below.
If you didn't make this request, please ignore this email.
